title: Filters
description: Standard filter bar pattern. DS inputs without labels, secondary Filtrar button, and two Carbon icon buttons: filter--add (orange) and filter--remove (red).
rules: Inputs use the DS .inp class — no label, placeholder only.
Flexible inputs (text) grow with flex:1; fixed-width inputs (select, date) have a min-width.
Filtrar uses .btn.sec — secondary pill button from DS.
filter--add icon button: 32×32px, border-radius:6px, border 1px var(--o5), icon fill var(--o5).
filter--remove icon button: 32×32px, border-radius:6px, border 1px var(--r6), icon fill var(--r6).
